source_pr.title: executor: return error as expected when indexHashJoin occur error or panic in handleTask
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/31129

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
As the description in https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/31129 mentioned.
And another bug is also fixed in this commit: when panic happen in `handleHashJoinInnerWorkerPanic`, error can not be returned successfully if keepOrder is true.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Integration test


Side effects

N/A

Documentation
N/A

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
Fix the bug that indexHashJoin may return the error `send on closed channel`.
```

symptoms: err := tk.QueryToErr("select /*+ INL_HASH_JOIN(s) */ * from t left join s on t.a=s.a order by t.pk") (executor/join_test.go)
failure_signature: err := tk.QueryToErr("select /*+ INL_HASH_JOIN(s) */ * from t left join s on t.a=s.a order by t.pk") (executor/join_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: err := tk.QueryToErr("select /*+ INL_HASH_JOIN(s) */ * from t left join s on t.a=s.a order by t.pk") (executor/join_test.go)
